steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The word until and the reference to Hales' proof in 1999 reveal what the blank should describe: what the unsolved conjecture did to mathematicians' efforts for nearly 2,000 years.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Defied (resisted, presented a challenge) expresses the relationship between an unproven conjecture and the mathematicians trying to solve it. The other options don't work: prefigured means foreshadowed (irrelevant), epitomized means embodied as an example (not describing opposition), and displaced means moved or replaced (wrong relationship). That matches choice A — A is correct.
